name: base64
description: Encode and decode using Base64 representation

name: --break
-b
options.description: Insert line breaks every count characters.  Default is 0, which generates an unbroken stream

name: --decode
-d
-D
options.description: Decode incoming Base64 stream into binary data

name: --input
-i
options.description: Read input from input_file.  Default is stdin; passing - also represents stdin

name: --output
-o
options.description: Write output to output_file.  Default is stdout; passing - also represents stdout
